features.additionalInfo: Minimum redraw $1,000.00, online or staff assisted
Loan terms of up to 30 years

eligibility.additionalValue: Australian citizen or a permanent resident of Australia or otherwise approved

eligibility.additionalInfo: Secrued by approved residential or rural lifestyle property
'Sepcial Offier'rates are available for principal and interest loans with a minimum loan amount of $100,000 and an LVR of up to 80%

fees.name: CHEQUE_ISSUING_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to us when a payment is made from your loan account by way of Financial Institution (FI) Cheque.

fees.name: CONSENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per consent. Payable to us when you ask us to consent to leasing, subdividing or any other dealing in relation to the security property.

fees.name: DEFAULT_ADMINISTRATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to us when the borrower (or security provider) has not performed an obligation on time including an obligation to pay money. This fee is payable monthly commencing one month after the obligation should have been performed and up to and including the month in which the obligation is performed. We debit these fees to your loan account each month until the default is remedied.

fees.name: DISCHARGE_ADMINISTRATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per Security. Payable to us each time we release a security.

fees.name: DISHONOUR_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable to us when a payment (such as a direct debit, salary deduction or cheque) is dishonoured.

fees.name: DUPLICATE_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per copied document. Payable to us when we provide a copy of a document.

fees.name: DUPLICATE_STATEMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per statement. Payable to us when we provide a copy of a statement at your request.

fees.name: PHOTOCOPYING_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per sheet. Payable to us when we provide a photocopy of any document at your request.

fees.name: PRODUCTION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per document per production. Payable to us if, at your or a security provider's request, we produce a document to the Land and Property Information division of the NSW Department of Lands or its equivalent in other jurisdictions.

fees.name: RENEGOTIATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per renegotiation. Payable to us whenever we agree to renegotiate or vary conditions on your loan other than altering interest rate options.

fees.name: SECURITY_SUBSTITUTION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per new security. Payable to us to substitute a new security for an existing one.

fees.name: SETTLEMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per settlement. Payable to us each time we or our solicitors attend settlement in connection with a security.

fees.name: VALUATION_FEE_CONSUMER_LOANS
fees.additionalInfo: Valuation fees are available upon enquiry. Payable in relation to each property to which a loan is secured, and may vary according to the location of the secured property. Initial valuation fee waived up to $250.00 for Package Home Loans.

fees.name: AGENTS_COSTS
fees.additionalInfo: Amount not ascertainable. Payable to us or our solicitor or their agent when they attend to the registration of a discharge of mortgage at your request or when an agent is required to attend a settlement, produce or lodge documents at the Lands and Property Services division of New South Wales Department of Lands or its equivalent in other jurisdictions.

fees.name: INFORMATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: $1.00 per minute ($20.00 minimum fee). The fee will be calculated on the actual time spent retrieving and providing the information requested. Payable to us to provide information and that information is provided in writing.

fees.name: SWITCHING_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Per switch. Payable to us when you convert from one interest rate option to another within your existing loan or if you elect to switch to another of our loan products

lendingRates.additionalInfo: Standard Variable Rate. LVR up to 90%. Minimum loan amount $100,000.00.
Special Offer Variable Rate. LVR up to 80%. Minimum loan amount $100,000.00.
Standard Variable Rate. LVR up to 95%. Minimum loan amount $100,000.00.
Special Offer Variable Rate. LVR up to 80%. Minimum loan amount $100,000.00.

detail.name: Budget Home Loan
detail.description: A low cost home loan with a competitive variable interest rate.
